features: PERMANENT HAIR COLOUR SET. With over 10 years of expertise and over 280K unique hair colour formulations, our team of licensed colourists has selected some of our most popular and universally flattering shades that you can take home right now — plus, you’ll have access to a personal colourist if you have any questions.
KEY BENEFITS. Up to 100% Grey Coverage, Crafted for All Hair Types, Multi-dimensional Results, 0% Ammonia, Access to a Colourist, Certified Cruelty-free

KEY INGREDIENTS. Quinoa & Jojoba Esters: Helps to lock in colour. Aloe Vera: Leaves hair supple with a natural shine. Keratin: Fortifies to help increase the strength of hair. Silk Amino Acid: Helps prevent moisture loss and boosts softness. FREE FROM: Ammonia, PPD, phthalates, parabens, SLS, and titanium dioxide
COLOURIST TIP. For best results, select a colour that is only two shades darker or lighter than your current hair colour

HOW TO USE. Start by buying your desired shade. Apply colour at home with the included extras and easy-to-follow instructions. And of course, you can contact your colourist to help every step of the way. Process for 35 minutes and enjoy your new look!

Follow the included directions for the best application technique for you. Wash and go. After allowing the colour to develop, simply wash your hair and go. All-in-one Hair Colour Kit Pigmented Root Powder Hydrating Hair Mask Heat Protectant Spray Key Benefits Up to 100% Grey Coverage Root Coverage in an Instant Added Shine and Moisture Prevents Heat Damage When to use it? Once Every 4-6 Weeks Stray Grey Emergency Once a Week Before Styling Permanency Level Permanent Temporary - - How do I know what colour is right for me? We suggest that you choose a colour that is no more than two shades lighter or darker than your current hair colour. What if I currently use your custom colour? Can I find a perfect colour match? Please consult with your eSalon colourist. With custom colour, we use different pigments, developers, & formula types to match your exact goals. As this is a one-size-fits-all product, this formula may be different than what you are currently using. Is this permanent hair dye? Yes, this formula is ammonia-free, permanent hair dye. Will this hair colour cover my greys? eSalon hair colour offers up to 100% grey coverage. How long will this hair colour last? It can vary depending on the condition of your hair, how often you wash your hair, and what types of products you use. Generally, you can expect this hair colour to resist fading for about 30 washes.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Caution: This product contains ingredients which may cause skin irritation on certain individuals and a preliminary test according to accompanying directions should first be made. This product must not be used for dyeing the eyelashes or eyebrows. Warning: Avoid contact with eyes. Rinse immediately if product comes into contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use this product on children.
